productDisplayName: Doodle Boy Little Boy Green Tshirts
description: Composition Green round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, has a ribbed neckline with a fabric tape inseam, stitch detailing on the sleeve and shirt hems, brand collection badge on left waist, and has graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print If your little boy is the apple of everyone’s eye, then this green t-shirt from the Bee Born collection of doodle definitely belongs in his wardrobe. The graphic print adds an element of sweetness to this tee, while the fabric keeps him fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and sneakers for that comfy look.
